content.en:
The thought that Bai Guyuan was a living being made him tremble, a little incredulous.

Because the white bone abyss is too big!

If this is a life, then it is still worth it? Even the master is not as good as such a life, right?

However, he didn't ask Shizun, after all, he couldn't ask Shizun about something he didn't understand, and then Shizun wouldn't have to be annoyed to death.

Therefore, he was ready to find out for himself.

So, Ye Tian once again condensed the will clone, and after the condensation was successful, he would go to investigate and understand.

This time, he forcibly condensed the will clone, even if it hurt at all, it didn't matter, anyway, he could reproduce an intact copy body again in the future, and it wouldn't affect anything.

Time passed, and after a long time, Ye Tian finally condensed his will clone again and went to the White Bone Abyss again.

However, Ye Tian couldn't find the entrance to the Devouring Time and Space, so he could only keep shuttling, shuttling at an extremely fast speed, hoping to touch the Devouring Time and Space.

If you can't touch it, it doesn't matter, you should go and collect Life White Stones, you can collect a large number of Life White Stones.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian found a large number of life white stones, which can be regarded as a kind of harvest.

It wasn't until a long time later, on this day, that Ye Tian finally touched the Devouring Time and Space again, and was directly swallowed by the Devouring Time and Space.

This time, Ye Tian didn't get close to the thing that seemed to be his heart, because he couldn't bear the devouring there.

Immediately.

Ye Tian forcibly searched for and studied in other channels and time and space outside the heart, feeling the changes here.

"Devour!"

"Time and space!"

"Life!"

From these changes in the Dao, a picture gradually emerged in Ye Tian's mind, a picture of a physical body, which was a kind of physical Dao composed of a variety of Dao.

The blood vessels of the flesh are combined with many ways, and the supreme flesh is cast with the blood vessels.

With the passage of time, a still flawed way of the flesh appeared in front of Ye Tian.

"There are still flaws, and the composition of the heart must be understood!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

However, the heart is there, once it is close, he can't bear it.

So, for the time being he can't go there.

However, Ye Tian did not give up and was still studying.

Finally, on this day, he really researched something.

"Every once in a while, the devouring force of the heart decreases, and at that point, I can get close to the heart, but not too close. Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he waited until this day and approached his heart.

Wow!

Following the vascular channel, Ye Tian saw a huge light source heart, connecting countless vascular channels, as if the source of everything.

And Ye Tian was here to resist the devouring of the heart, while perceiving the composition of the heart.

"Break my !!"

Ye Tian's will was urged to the extreme, and he finally broke through the blockade of his heart and sensed the inside.

And this perception, he was suddenly confused.

Because, the inside of the heart is not the normal heart he imagined, no, it should be said that this is not the heart at all, and even these blood vessels are not real blood vessels.

At the same time, he finally understood that Bai Guyuan was not a life.

If Bai Guyuan was life, his master would have known about it a long time ago and would have told him.

There is indeed a real life here, not a white bone abyss, but a space-time area deep in this heart, where a body is lying, and the so-called heart and blood vessels are all devouring the life force of the outside world poured into this body to maintain his vitality.

Or this is an instinctive maintenance, not the other party's restraint, but even so, it still creates a treasure like Bai Guyuan.

And the heart and blood vessels should be the manifestation of the other party's power!

Click!

Ye Tian's will clone couldn't bear it, and it collapsed again.

However, Ye Tian was very happy, he finally understood the truth.

Moreover, he obtained a physical body diagram, which can also be said to be a physical cultivation method, which is to completely imitate the physical body of the other party.

More importantly.

"Hahahaha, I perceive the other party's talent!!!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

I always thought that Ye Tian thought that the mastery-level ancestral endowment was the highest, after all, his copying talent was also the level of the mastery-level ancestral endowment, but he had just sensed another ancestral endowment and surpassed the mastery level.

It's definitely beyond the control level, because even if it's a copy talent, it's only copied to the opponent's name, and the progress is still at 0%, which means that it can't be copied at all at the moment.

He must upgrade the copy talent before he can copy it to the opponent's talent.

And this talent is a perfect-level ancestor.

Perfect Grade Ancestral Fu: Swallowing Body

Ye Tian didn't know the usefulness of this perfect-level ancestral endowment, but it was definitely terrifying.

"I finally know that there is a talent beyond the mastery-level ancestral endowment, and next, I hope to obtain the treasure that allows the replication talent to be upgraded, as long as the replication talent is upgraded, I can obtain the perfect level ancestral endowment to swallow the body. "

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Of course, in addition to this harvest this time, he also obtained a method of cultivating the physical body, let's just be regarded as a method, even if it is to imitate the other party, but once it is perfected, it can become a powerful secret art of his own, surpassing any of his previous secret arts.

"It's time to go back, just in case, if this guy wakes up, I'm finished!"

Thereupon.

Ye Tian immediately urged the seal of the master.

Rumble!!!

The space-time channel opened, and Ye Tian quickly stepped into it, constantly teleporting.

Not long after, Ye Tian returned to Wanyuan Mountain.

......

After coming back, Ye Tian annihilated this body and re-copied another body, which was also for the sake of safety, in case it was left by the other party, it could also be completely erased, and the causal connection could be directly broken.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to continue his cultivation, breaking the shackles and chains, and at the same time studying the secret technique of the flesh body, both of which were carried out at the same time.

Time flies, there are countless white stones of life, Ye Tian's progress is very fast, and after a long time, he finally broke a shackle chain.

Before you know it, hundreds of millions of years have passed.

On this day, Ye Tian's shackles and chains had already broken twenty.

At the same time, Ye Tian also created a top-notch flesh body secret technique of his own by imitating the body of that terrifying powerhouse, and he suspected that this secret technique might not even be created by the master.

The focus of this physical secret technique is to create an incomparably terrifying physical body, cultivated to the extreme, and with the primordial-level control body, it can burst out with a physical strength that transcends the boundary.

He named this secret art of the flesh the Perfect Body!

On this day, Ye Tian began to officially cultivate the perfect body!
